content:
I have served as CFO since 2018. I managed VedaCorp’s finances with full authority from the Board, including during Dr. Nair’s medical leave. All transactions were approved via board resolutions dated January 10, 2022. The consultancy agreements with Sparrow Holdings and Vireo Ventures were legitimate. They provided IT infrastructure advisory services — they have offices in Mumbai and Dubai, though their registration is in Mauritius for tax efficiency.

I never forged documents. I did not bribe Sunita Rao. I did not control any offshore accounts. The Goa property was purchased by 'A. Mehta' — a third party unrelated to me. I have no brother named Amit. I am not related to Dr. Nair beyond professional ties. I have no motive to defraud the company — my salary and bonuses were fully paid. I acted in good faith. If errors occurred, they were due to poor documentation by the finance team, not criminal intent.
